emails.subject: Duke
emails.body: Duke This is the redline version. Veronica please review the change to days and language in section 11 (b). They are ready to sign, please get back to me asap. DP Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Legal 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron 713-853-7658 713-646-3490 Fax

emails.subject: RE: Duke
emails.body: Please contact Neil Brandenmark 403-297-9885 re the 1mm threshold amount. Thanks To: Perlingiere, Debra; Vanek, Darren

emails.subject: Duke
emails.body: Attached is the final redline for Duke they are ready to sign. Please take a quick look at the credit provisions to make sure all is ok. Thanks! Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Legal 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 Debra.Perlingiere@enron.com 713-853-7658 713-646-3490 Fax

emails.subject: RE: Duke
emails.body: RE: Duke Looks good--let's send it out for execution, finally. Thanks--Veronica To: Espinoza, Veronica

emails.subject: RE: Duke
emails.body: Thanks!!! Please let me know about Greeley, Gerald is getting impatient. Thanks! To: Perlingiere, Debra
